summary: Iteration 77 testing completed successfully. All task metrics filtering features verified: 1) Home Dashboard tiles navigate with correct URL params (status=active, overdue=true), 2) Task page filters show correct values based on URL params, 3) Backend supports ?overdue=true and ?status=active query params, 4) Task page metric tiles have active highlighting (ring-2), 5) Overdue badge with dismiss button works, 6) Clear button resets all filters, 7) Task list counts match metric tile numbers.
critical_code_review_comments: TaskMetricsWidget.js correctly navigates with status=active for 'Assigned to Me' and 'Created by Me' tiles
TaskMetricsWidget.js correctly navigates with overdue=true for 'Overdue' tile
TaskMetricsWidget.js correctly navigates with view=my_tasks&severity=high&status=active for 'High Severity' tile
TaskManagement.js correctly initializes filters from URL params including filterOverdue from searchParams.get('overdue')
TaskManagement.js correctly handles status=active filter to exclude closed tasks
TaskManagement.js metric tiles have isActive highlighting with ring-2 ring-emerald-500
TaskManagement.js shows Overdue badge with X dismiss button when filterOverdue is true
TaskManagement.js Clear button resets all filters including filterOverdue
Backend task_management.py correctly handles overdue=true query param with server-side filtering
Backend task_management.py correctly handles status=active to exclude closed tasks
Backend my-dashboard-stats endpoint returns correct counts for assigned_to_me, created_by_me, overdue, high_severity
context_for_next_testing_agent: Task metrics filtering is fully functional. Home Dashboard tiles navigate to /tasks with correct filters (status=active, overdue=true). Task page filters correctly read URL params and display appropriate values. Metric tiles have active highlighting. Overdue badge appears with dismiss button. Clear button resets all filters. Backend supports overdue=true and status=active query params.

Task_List_Count_Matches_Metric.example: Created by Me metric shows 2, task list shows 2 tasks
